company.name: Tomorrow.io
company.notes: Weather + climate intel. Visualization-heavy. Israeli bullseye for science/climate angle. Multi-city.

research.status_summary: Actively hiring and aggressively expanding post-unicorn status, having closed a $210M Series F (in two tranches: $175M in Feb 2026, +$35M in May 2026) with no reported layoffs in 2026 — though Glassdoor reviews cite two rounds of layoffs in the prior two years.
research.hiring_policy: Open roles are listed across ZipRecruiter, Wellfound, and Built In (10+ active postings as of May–Jun 2026), with some roles explicitly US-only and restricted to US citizens/permanent residents due to DoD export controls; no public evidence of EOR hiring or broad visa sponsorship, and federal-track roles explicitly bar non-citizens without clearance.
recent_news: Feb 3, 2026: Raised $175M Series F led by Stonecourt Capital & HarbourVest, achieving unicorn valuation (>$1B), earmarked for DeepSky — the world's first AI-native weather satellite constellation; 13 satellites already in LEO with 60-min global revisit rate.

May 18–19, 2026: Extended Series F by an additional $35M from Pitango + Harel Group, bringing total Series F to $210M and cumulative funding to ~$535M; capital targeting agentic AI platform buildout and satellite network expansion.

Apr 28, 2026: Launched Spring 2026 product update featuring a native MCP server, Asset Insight Dashboard, and agentic AI stack — positioning the platform as embeddable infrastructure for real-time operational intelligence across aviation (Altitude) and insurance (Shield) verticals.

Expanding federal footprint: actively recruiting for NOAA AWIPS, FAA next-gen air traffic control, and DoD weather sensor contracts (~$20M already secured from US DoD); also signed deals with Bahamas Aviation Climate Network and F1 teams for 2026 race season.
Fast Company ranked Tomorrow.io #1 Most Innovative Space Company for both 2025 and 2026; ~$100M ARR reported at time of Feb 2026 raise.
research.growth_signal: Strong upward trajectory — headcount at ~218 (PitchBook 2026), $535M total raised, $100M ARR, unicorn valuation, dual-tranche Series F in a single quarter, and a Palantir partnership (announced Jul 2025) signal platform-layer ambitions rather than point-solution growth.
research.fit_for_lior: Near-perfect fit: Israeli-founded (Boston HQ + ~150-person Israel team), deeply visualization-heavy weather/climate intelligence platform now building agentic AI and MCP-native tooling — ideal Creative AI / Product Analyst angle pitching data storytelling, climate dashboard UX, or AI-agent integration narratives across multi-city enterprise and government verticals.
